DEPT 606, JDG RYAN, G.ESPINOCILLA-CLK, D.COSTELLO-CSR. 10:05AM C/C FOR TRIAL. PLTF BY J/LAURICELLA. DEFT R/BEWLEY NOT PRESENT. ORAL EVID BY PLTF. CASE SUBMITTED. AT PLTF'S REQUEST, CONT'D TO 5/11/98 FOR COURT'S RULING. 10:22AM COURT RECONVENES. ALL PRESENT. AT PLTF'S & DEFT'S REQUEST, A STIP FOR ENTRY OF JUDGMENT IS MADE. ITS TERMS ARE STATED ON THE RECORD. PLTF TO PREPARE STIP.

THE COURT ORDERED THE FOLLOWING JUDGMENT ENTERED: IT IS ADJUDGED THAT PLAINTIFF RECOVER FROM DEFENDANT BEWLEY, ROD THE RESTITUTION AND POSSESSION OF THE PREMISES: 2666-A SAN JOSE AVE. SAN FRANCISCO, CA 94112. $3,601.66 RENT, $2,000.00 ATTORNEY FEES, $173.00 COSTS, TOTAL JUDGMENT $5,774.66, LEASE FORFEITED, JUDGMT STAYED AS LONG AS DEFT COMPLIES W/ ALL TERMS & CONDS. IF DEFT DEFAULTS, PLTF BY EX PARTE APPLIC IS ENTITLED TO IMMED ISSUANCE OF W/E. PLTF & DEFT SHALL ENTER INTO A NEW MONTH-TO-MONTH LEASE FOR $700/M. IF DEFT COMPLIES W/ ALL TERMS, PLTF WILL DISM W/ PREJ. SEE JDGMT FOR OTHER TERMS...
